top_signals.title: China Will Open Its Market to AI Chips From US, Nvidia’s CEO Says
top_signals.summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang, speaking days after he joined President Donald Trump’s summit in China, said he expects Chinese authorities to eventually allow the import of artificial intelligence chips from the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Iran War Could Trigger a Global Fertilizer Shock
top_signals.summary: The loss of fertilizer shipments coming from the Persian Gulf as a result of the Iran war got me thinking about the chemist Justus von Liebig, a prominent 19th-century proponent of the mineral theory of plant nutrition. Liebig is the popularizer of what is now known as Liebig's Law of the Minimum. The law states that the least available essential nutrient limits the growth of plants. This means once a grower runs out of one essential nutrient, adding extra of others will not make up for the lack of the one that is limited. Liebig's eponymous law…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO set to hand $20bn stake to one hedge fund
top_signals.summary: D1 Capital is among the Wall Street firms in line for big rewards if the rocket maker successfully lists next month
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
